name: Smoky Honey Chili Lasagne
description: A smoky, slightly spicy lasagne with ground chicken, zucchini, bell pepper, ricotta, and mozzarella, finished with lemon zest and fresh basil.

ingredientSections.heading: Meat Sauce
items: 350-400g ground chicken or lean ground beef
0.5 tsp chili flakes (more for extra heat)

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Dice all vegetables.
Heat oil in a large pan. Brown the ground meat until crumbly.
Add onion and garlic, cook for 2 minutes.
Add zucchini and bell pepper, cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1 minute to deepen the flavor.
Add diced tomatoes, smoked paprika, chili flakes, Italian herbs, salt, and pepper. Simmer gently for 8-10 minutes.
Stir in honey and a small splash of balsamic vinegar. Taste and adjust seasoning — add more chili for extra kick.
Layer in a baking dish: sauce, lasagne sheets, spoonfuls of ricotta. Repeat. Finish with sauce and mozzarella on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown and bubbling.
Rest for 5 minutes before serving. Finish with lemon zest, fresh basil, and a drizzle of olive oil.
